source: Pi session 2026-05-14 — recurring '[Memory] L3 search remember/look/back/produced → 4 results' noise
title: L3 search must drop stopword-only queries and BM25 near-zero scores
what_failed: Every turn that contained the word 'remember' or 'recall' would trigger a memory_read whose query was a single English stopword. BM25 always returns SOMETHING, so the user saw four irrelevant 'matches' polluting the conversation log on every turn.
where_failed: tools/tools_memory.py::memory_read printed L3 search results unconditionally; _hybrid_search_l3 had no score floor.
why_likely: Search quality was tuned for keyword queries, not for the LLM accidentally passing through filler words.
suggested_fix: 1. memory_read: skip L3 search entirely when query reduces to zero meaningful tokens after stopword removal. 2. _hybrid_search_l3: enforce a BM25 raw-score floor (0.5) below which results are noise.
